description: Small and medium widget three-dot dropdown rebuild. The menu opens from the top-right ellipsis as a native popover so it stays visible, readable, and clickable outside the widget bounds.

identity.background_mood: dusty rose glass over warm desktop

layout.panel_shape: rounded square widget plus rounded dropdown page
layout.dropdown_placement: anchored top-right under the three-dot icon
layout.dropdown_animation: native popover reveal with smooth toggle animation

Small_Widget_Container.notes: Small mode defaults to a 162 x 162 compact glass widget with dusty rose gradient and bottom playback strip.

Three_Dot_Icon.notes: Top-right 18 pt black ellipsis trigger remains visible and anchors the dropdown.

Dropdown_List_Animation.notes: Dropdown uses native SwiftUI popover anchoring, avoiding window clipping and keeping all rows clickable.

Size_Selection_Logic.notes: Small, Medium, Large, and Desktop Widget rows remain clickable and call onSelectSize(mode).

Medium_Widget_Readability.notes: Medium mode is now a 344 x 132 horizontal compact widget with stronger white text, visible controls, in-art X, and top-right ellipsis.

Popover_Text_Contrast.notes: Three-dot and X popovers use dark ink over bright frosted material so labels remain visible.
